creators.tagline: Animelee project lead — cell-shaded character mods over the cast
Animelee Fox skins (Peco/Ping Pong) and general Melee mods
Character skins — Thief Falco, Ryu Hayabusa Sheik, Tony Falcon
Stage skins and custom stages with 1:1 collisions for Slippi netplay
animelee-style melee character models — a few uploads a month
